title: みんなのオグリキャップ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Oguri Cap wants to video-call the folks
back in her hometown to show them her new
outfit, so I join her to help out with the camera.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, Tome. Can you see my outfit?

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can! Wooow! It's so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! This outfit was designed by a fan who
said they wanted to see me shine brighter.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wearing this makes me feel all warm inside... It's
sort of like I really am shining.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wanted to show it to you all today.
Take a look at how much I've changed!

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're running with more vigor than ever!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Did you see how differently I handled the corners?

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text:
Not just your cornering, everything looked
different! The old you doesn't even compare!

text_block_list.name: Yone
text_block_list.text:
Before, you would complain that your legs ached
after just a few laps on dirt... You're probably
unbeatable now.
Not if I got anythin' to say about it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I heard your whole chat! How 'bout ya try beatin' me before ya go sayin' you're the best? I'm in the mood for a good partner run.

text_block_list.name: Yone
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Who's that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, her name's Tama. She's a friend of mine... and
my rival.

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text: Ooh, your rival! I've gotta see this!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Bet! So, c'mon, Oguri. Ya wanna show the folks
back home how bright ya can shine, yeah? Then
you'd better run your best, or it won't be worth a
ding!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...You're right. Okay. I accept your challenge!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Sorry Oguri, but I'm takin' the win!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No... you're... not!

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! They're neck and neck! You can do it,
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Look how happy she is. She's finally found
someone to run against after all this time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh! I almost had ya! Mark my words, next
win's gonna be mine!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Nuh-uh... I'll win... next time, too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Dem's fightin' words! In that case, I better
get to trainin', stat! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
What a wonderful friend you've got there. Thanks
for showing us so much today, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there's one more thing I want to show
you. I'd like to perform a song, just like we do
after official races.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After all, concerts are where we get to thank our
fans for all their support.

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
Wow, she's amazing. It's like she's become a real
shining star!

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text:
Thanking your fans, huh? I bet she's been putting
her all into rehearsals.

text_block_list.name: Yone
text_block_list.text:
I remember that cute little girl who could barely
keep rhythm with the beat, but now look at how
wonderfully she's grown.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So, what did you think? Was I shining?

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
You did. I just about had to cover my eyes. You
really have grown, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
We'll always be here supporting you, you know.
Even if we can't help you too much anymore...
choice_data_list: That's not the case at all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, everyone's support is where I get my
energy from!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I only ever made it this far because you held me
up and cheered me on even when I was weak.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I shine because everyone shines. That's how it's
always been, and that's how it's always gonna be!
I want you all to know that.

text_block_list.name: Yone
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Shige, are you crying?

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text: You're looking a bit misty-eyed yourself, Yone.
choice_data_list: Looks like you're shining a little too brightly.
Looks like you're shining a little too brightly.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Is there anything you want to add too,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're the one directly responsible for my
brightness. That's why I think they should hear
from you.
choice_data_list: I'm going to make her dreams come true!

I don't have a lot of experience, but I'll do my
best.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
That's just the determination I'd expect from
Oguri's trainer! I sure hope you'll come pay us a
visit sometime. We'll have a great big pot of beef
tendon stew waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, beef tendon stew! That's totally right,
Tome's stew tastes amazing!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I bet you'll love it too, Trainer! Let's visit my
hometown together soon!

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I'd wish you good luck, but I don't think
you need it! You're a heck of a trainer, y'know,
taking care of Oguri on your lonesome like that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, now that you mention it, it's pretty
amazing how Trainer alone has basically taken on
everyone's roles to support me.

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text:
It sure is. I remember birthdays and holidays
always being reeeal tough... although, I guess
Oguri always asking Santa for the same gift made
things easier.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: C-c'mon, Shige... I'm going red here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap might be blushing, but to me, those
look like the rosy cheeks of a happy girl.
